reviews.review_description: Very good idea for the game, interesting and relaxing gameplay. Nice job developers!

developer_response.body: So glad you enjoyed the concept and found it relaxing! 😊 Big shoutout from the whole dev team – your kind words fuel our passion. Stay tuned for more awesomeness ahead - new tasks and time trial mode!

reviews.review_description: I like how its made! It reminds me of job simulator

developer_response.body: It's awesome you noticed some of the influences behind our game! We've definitely been inspired by some great titles out there, and it's cool that it resonated with you. ❤️

reviews.review_description:
Kids loved it. Tasks are pretty creative and you get the chance to play around just for fun. 

What really surprised me was the fish in the aquarium, that was a really cool thing.

The only thing I wish is that would be a bit longer, but for the price I can’t complain!!!

developer_response.body: Thanks a bunch for your review! 🎉 Stoked you enjoyed TaskTwist. Heads up: more tasks and a new timed mode with funky home rewards (think: aquarium octopus 🐙 and apple guns 🍏🔫) are coming soon! Your feedback rocks – stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: It is really fun to play and I didn't find any bugs.

developer_response.body: Woohoo! 🎉 Thrilled to hear you had a fun time and everything ran smoothly! Your positive vibes made our day. Stay tuned for more adventures in the game and thanks a ton for playing!
